# kCFSOCKSStatusCodeKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFSOCKSStatusCodeKey ](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfsocksstatuscodekey)

-  kCFSOCKSStatusCodeKey 

Global Variable# kCFSOCKSStatusCodeKey

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFSOCKSStatusCodeKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfsocksstatuscodekey#Discussion)

When a SOCKS error occurs, querying this key returns the last status code sent by the SOCKS server in response to the previous operation.
